questionHtml:
What is the enthalpy change of the following reaction?

CH2CHCH2CH3 + HBr → CH3CHBrCH2CH3

A.  –119.6 kJ

B.  +119.6 kJ

C.  –119.8 kJ

D.  +119.8 kJ

meta.title: What is the enthalpy change of the following reaction? CH2CHCH2CH3 + HBr → CH3CHBrCH2CH3 A. –119.6 kJ B. +119.6 kJ C. –119.8 kJ D. +119.8 kJ
